markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep-dive into Navan's travel product to inform content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Navan's core value is driving adoption** by eliminating reasons for users to book outside the platform (e.g., loyalty points, mid-trip support), which solves the industry's common problem of \>50% off-platform spend.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [**A proprietary content engine** sources inventory from multiple sources (not just a GDS) to find the most competitive prices and offer more options, directly improving savings and adoption.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [**Unique policy features** like dynamic thresholds (adapting to market prices) and Navan Rewards (incentivizing users to save) enable flexible, cost-effective travel programs.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [**The 24-hour void period** for out-of-policy bookings secures prices while awaiting approval, preventing cost increases that often occur with legacy systems.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Low Adoption & Off-Platform Spend

  - [Business travel's main challenge is low platform adoption, with \>50% of spend often occurring off-platform.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [This creates a lack of visibility for finance and accounting, as expenses are filed manually and often months late.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [Navan's strategy is to eliminate all reasons for users to book outside the tool, ensuring policy compliance and spend visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)

### The Solution: A Seamless, Integrated Platform

  - [**User Experience (OBT):** A mobile-first online booking tool (OBT) with a consumer-grade interface.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [**Automated Provisioning:** User data (cost centers, entity) is synced directly from HR systems, ensuring policies are always correct.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [**Delegate Booking:** A single interface allows assistants to book for multiple travelers, regardless of location.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [**Trip Management:** A single view for all trip details (flights, hotels, invoices) with in-app actions like seat selection and cancellations.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [**Loyalty Program Integration:** Users earn and apply their personal loyalty points and benefits (e.g., free seat selection) directly in the tool, removing a key reason for booking elsewhere.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)

### Core Differentiators: Content & Policy

  - [**Proprietary Content Engine:**](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
      - [**Problem:** Most tools rely on a single Global Distribution System (GDS), which limits options and pricing.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
      - [**Solution:** Navan's engine connects to multiple sources, comparing fares to find the most competitive price and offering a wider selection.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [**Dynamic Policy Engine:**](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
      - [**Problem:** Static policies are either too restrictive in high season (blocking necessary travel) or too loose in low season (allowing overspending).](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
      - [**Solution:** Dynamic thresholds adapt to real-time market prices, enabling travel during peak demand while ensuring cost control during off-peak periods.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
  - [**Navan Rewards:**](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
      - [**Problem:** Users have no incentive to save the company money.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
      - [**Solution:** Gamifies savings by rewarding users with cash for personal travel when they book below the policy threshold.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
      - [**Why it works:** Creates a win-win-win: user earns, company saves, and Navan retains spend for personal trips.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=1751.0)

### Mid-Trip Support & Expense Management

  - [**Disruption Handling:** Automated workflows and in-house agents manage flight delays and cancellations, preventing costly offline interactions.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [**Expense Capture:** Integrates with services like Uber/Lyft for automatic expense capture.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [**Policy-Driven Cards:** Navan cards enforce policy at the point of sale (e.g., declining food purchases when not traveling), providing real-time control.](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)

      - [Expense product deep-dive](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
      - [Admin portal deep-dive](https://fathom.video/share/zDohkTy31YPqm9WBN1ZMRkjezw-X--pN?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
